heading: Powers
label: 190306 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)19030636:5102., , .Oct. 23, 1992Pub. L. 102–484, title XVIII, § 1822106 Stat. 2584The words “and subject to the laws of such State” are omitted as unnecessary.
